segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Excuse me, would you mind taking a quick photo for me?

segments.speaker: Tourist
segments.text: Sure. How do you want it framed?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: If you could get the river and a little bit of the skyline, that would be great.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thanks so much. That looks great.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I just moved here for school, so I'm half tourist, half overwhelmed new resident.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I'm trying to walk around and get a feel for the city before classes get intense.

segments.speaker: Tourist
segments.text: This is a good place for that.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Definitely. Do you know if this path loops all the way around?

segments.speaker: Tourist
segments.text: Yeah, you can keep following it for a long walk.
